evidence_quotes.quote: terminating their products after the purchase, with short to none previous notice.

paragraphs.text: Dear legislator, I would like to express my suggestion to involve the Stop Killing Games initiative's ideas into the Digital Fairness Act. As you may be aware, there exist actors on the market who fill their videogames with malicious practices and partake in anti-consumer behaviour, such as terminating their products after the purchase, with short to none previous notice. The Stop Killing Games initiative addresses these issues and has gathered a considerable public support in the EU alone. It is my belief it could be a worthy and productive addition to the Digital Fairness Act.
